title: Beldray Pet Plus+ Rubber Dustpan And Brush Set - Non-Scratch Broom Bristles, Built In Squeegee Edge For Pet Hair & Spills, Suitable For Hard Floors, Surfaces, Clips Together For Compact Storage
features: Use this handheld rubber dustpan and brush set from the Beldray Pet Plus+ collection to clean your home from top to bottom
Ideal for hard floors and surfaces, carpets and window sills, this lightweight set makes quick work of cleaning crumbs and dust.
The handheld broom has non-scratch rubber bristles that easily lifts dust, dirt and pet hair and a squeegee edge for liquids.
Clipping together for simple storage, the dustpan measures 30 x 22 x 6.5 cm, and the brush measures 26.5 X 6.5 X 6.5cm.
The dustpan has a strong rubber lip with scraper edge to collect debris easily from the floor with teeth to clean the brush bristles.
Parts of this product are made from synthetic rubber

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Bodenreinigung, Staubwischen, Reinigung von verschütteten Flüssigkeiten, Tierhaarreinigung
